<?php namespace Illuminate\Auth\Events; use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels; class Login { use SerializesModels; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param string $guard The authentication guard name. * @param \Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\Authenticatable $user The authenticated user. * @param bool $remember Indicates if the user should be "remembered". */ public function __construct( public $guard, public $user, public $remember, ) { } }
